accepted_risks: Reviewer is the same agent as the extractor; independent re-review is recommended before the skill is switched to active.
Only single-channel text extraction was performed; rendered-page dual pass was not completed by an independent reviewer.
Official URL and exact retrieved_at are not verified in local archive metadata.
Page references use printed/footer page numbers, which are offset by +2 from physical PDF pages. Any downstream tool using physical page numbers must apply the offset.

findings.issue: Initial source-index incorrectly stated that footer page numbers align with physical PDF page numbers. Corrected to note the +2 offset.
findings.required_fix: Keep printed page numbers in page-map but document the physical-to-printed offset clearly.

findings.issue: Bullet-point grouping was reconstructed from text extraction; visual confirmation recommended.
findings.required_fix: Independent reviewer to sample 3-5 subject content pages for bullet continuity.
